condition.description: Deterministic Mandelbrot zoom path used as the first primary fractal stream.
Deterministic Julia stream used to separate fractal-family effects from one Mandelbrot path.
Phase-scrambled transform of mandelbrot_zoom_a with source RGB pixels reassigned by luminance quantile rank.
Phase-scrambled transform of julia_zoom_b with source RGB pixels reassigned by luminance quantile rank.
Low-pass frequency transform of mandelbrot_zoom_a; preserves coarse structure while suppressing local detail.
High-pass frequency transform of mandelbrot_zoom_a; preserves local detail while suppressing coarse structure.
Low-pass frequency transform of mandelbrot_zoom_a with source RGB pixels reassigned by luminance quantile rank.
High-pass frequency transform of mandelbrot_zoom_a with source RGB pixels reassigned by luminance quantile rank.
Low-pass frequency transform of julia_zoom_b; preserves coarse structure while suppressing local detail.
High-pass frequency transform of julia_zoom_b; preserves local detail while suppressing coarse structure.
Low-pass frequency transform of julia_zoom_b with source RGB pixels reassigned by luminance quantile rank.
High-pass frequency transform of julia_zoom_b with source RGB pixels reassigned by luminance quantile rank.
